message:
fix: Add lock protection for concurrent backup registry access

Prevents race conditions when multiple agents or processes access
the backup registry simultaneously:

Changes:
- Import ConfigLock from crate::state::lock
- Add REGISTRY_LOCK_TIMEOUT constant (5 seconds)
- Wrap save_backup_entry() with backup-registry lock acquisition
- Wrap prune_old_backups() with backup-registry lock acquisition

The lock ensures atomic read-modify-write cycles on registry.json,
preventing data corruption when:
- Multiple fleet deploy operations run concurrently
- Backup pruning happens during active deployments
- Parallel agents trigger version upgrades simultaneously

Lock timeout is short (5s) to fail fast rather than block indefinitely.
The existing atomic temp-file write pattern remains as defense-in-depth.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
